steps.title: Target the shared trait
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between Mara and Elias. The notes say both specimens are members of the genus Tyrannosaurus, so the best sentence must directly compare the two specimens and name what they share.

steps.title: Check the focus of each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: States that both specimens belong to the same genus.
  • Choice B: Contrasts the museums where the specimens are housed.
  • Choice C: Describes only Mara's museum and location.
  • Choice D: Describes only Elias and gives no comparison with Mara.
The answer is A.
